segments.text: Олья, привет, that means hello in Russian.
and today we're going to learn some really fun Russian words.
our word of the day is pagoda.
Олья, it sounds like page plus ода.
Олья, imagine turning the page of a weather calendar every single day.
Олья, now let's use it in a sentence.
Олья, that means what is the weather like today?
Now we will build more weather words together.
you have to dodge the raindrops.
we can say it is still in a dожд.
that means heavy rain is falling.
an old wind that has been blowing for years.
we say сегодня still in a witter.
that means today there is strong wind.
it sounds like soul plus NC,
that means the sun is shining brightly.
that means there is a big white cloud in the sky.
with an H at the beginning.
that means it is cold outside.
that means today it is warm.
that means a storm is approaching.
and our last new word is
what is the weather like today?
what kind of weather is it?
what is the wind like today?
what is the sky like today?
even when it is very cold,
